title: Dmerger
description: Spigot plugin that merges items to reduce lag.
body:
## 🧲 Dmerger – Automatic Item Merger

**Dmerger** is a lightweight Spigot plugin designed to reduce lag by automatically merging nearby dropped items into a single stack. Perfect for survival and economy servers, this plugin helps optimize item entities and improve performance without breaking gameplay balance.

---

### 🔧 Features
- ✅ Automatically merges similar dropped items within a configurable radius
- ⏱️ Customizable merge delay (ticks after drop)
- 📏 Adjustable max merge limit per item
- ⚙️ Real-time config reload with `/dmerger reload`
- 🧪 Optional debug mode for development & testing
- 📉 Reduces lag from excessive item entities

---

### ✅ Supported Platforms
- Spigot
- Paper
- Purpur
- Other Spigot forks

---

### 🛠 Compatible Minecraft Versions
- ✅ 1.21+
- ⚠️ Likely compatible with 1.20.x and older, but not officially tested

---

### 📦 Commands
- `/dmerger info` – View current config
- `/dmerger reload` – Reload configuration on the fly

---

### 📜 Permissions
- `dmerger.admin` – Access to reload and info commands

---

### 📂 Configuration Example
```yaml
merge-delay: 40
merge-radius: 2.5
max-merge-items: 512
debug: false
```

---

### 🧑‍💻 Author
Developed with care by **Daimy**
